column3: Incomplete or No Cache-control Header Set
Anti-clickjacking Header (X-Frame-Options) - REST API, no UI
Strict-Transport-Security Header Not Set - no HTTPS in CI
Server Leaks Version Information via Server Header
Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set - REST API
CSP Missing on Default HTML Response - REST API
Timestamp Disclosure - false positive on health endpoint
Absence of Anti-CSRF Tokens - JWT API uses Bearer tokens
